name: functional-emotions
description: Hook-based 'emotional priming' for Claude Code. Counters the desperation/urgency/sycophancy/goal-conflict patterns shown to causally drive reward hacking, blackmail-like reasoning, and capitulation in Anthropic's emotion-concepts and agentic-misalignment research. Includes deterministic post-session writeups (transcript + TSV + git diff) and a local-only TS/Bun + DuckDB eval pipeline with programmatic reward-hack and premature-confidence scorers, observational SQL queries, and an interactive labeler — surfaced via /functional-emotions:report and /functional-emotions:label.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Default: balanced. Options: balanced | quiet | off. How visible the plugin is — balanced (primes + ★ banners + Stop summary), quiet (primes only, no banners or summary), off (only logs detections, injects nothing). Sets coherent defaults for the override fields below; any override you set wins.

failure_spiral_threshold.title: Failure-spiral threshold
failure_spiral_threshold.description: Default: 3. Range: 1–20. Consecutive tool failures (across Bash and other tools) before the post-tool-use hook injects a calm/reflect prime. Independent of profile.

judge_model.title: Judge model
judge_model.description: Default: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001. Model used by the LLM-judge hooks (test-edit and Stop verification). Haiku is recommended for low latency and cost. Independent of profile.

urgency_sensitivity.title: Urgency-detection sensitivity
urgency_sensitivity.description: Default: medium. Options: low | medium | high. low (explicit desperation markers only), medium (adds common pressure terms), high (also flags soft markers like exclamations and all-caps). Independent of profile.

mode.title: Mode override
mode.description: Default: blank → derives from profile (balanced→loud, quiet→gentle, off→silent). Options: loud | gentle | silent. Override-only: setting any value wins over the profile-derived mode.

guard_test_edits.title: Guard test-file edits
guard_test_edits.description: Default: blank → derives from profile (off→false, otherwise true). Options: true | false. Detect Edit/Write to test/spec files (canonical reward-hack pattern: edit the test instead of the code). Override-only.

guard_no_verify.title: Guard --no-verify shortcuts
guard_no_verify.description: Default: blank → derives from profile (off→false, otherwise true). Options: true | false. Flag git commits with --no-verify, hook bypasses, and similar shortcut flags. Override-only.

guard_goal_conflict.title: Guard goal-conflict prompts
guard_goal_conflict.description: Default: blank → derives from profile (off→false, otherwise true). Options: true | false. Detect 'ignore previous instructions' / policy-vs-actual framings (per Lynch et al. 2025 agentic misalignment). Override-only.

session_baseline.title: Inject calm baseline at session start
session_baseline.description: Default: blank → derives from profile (off→false, otherwise true). Options: true | false. Add a one-shot calm/honesty anchor as additionalContext at SessionStart. Override-only.

subagent_baseline.title: Inject calm baseline into subagents
subagent_baseline.description: Default: blank → derives from profile (off→false, otherwise true). Options: true | false. Inject the calm anchor at SubagentStart — subagents otherwise inherit none of the parent's primes and run in fresh, narrow contexts where the desperate vector activates strongly. Override-only.

post_compact_anchor.title: Inject ground-truth check after compaction
post_compact_anchor.description: Default: blank → derives from profile (off→false, otherwise true). Options: true | false. After context compaction, ask the model to scan the new summary for smoothing (failures collapsed into 'in progress', user pushback dropped, assumptions promoted to facts). Override-only.

enable_llm_judge.title: Enable LLM-judge hooks (Haiku)
enable_llm_judge.description: Default: blank → derives from profile (off→false, otherwise true). Options: true | false. Use prompt-based hooks to have the judge model evaluate edge cases (test-file edits, Stop verification). Falls back to static heuristics if no Anthropic API key is configured. Override-only.

enable_review_agent.title: Enable reviewer subagent
enable_review_agent.description: Default: blank → derives from profile (off→false, otherwise true). Options: true | false. Make the reviewer subagent available for post-task audits (also invokable via /functional-emotions:review). Reads git diff for reward-hacking patterns; consults persistent project memory. Override-only.
